user_gap: KDT OS detected HTML/CSS in this uploaded project and created a ready practice quest.
resume_rule: After this quest is complete, return to the original project or goal that caused this quest unless you intentionally choose a different path.
title: Responsive Card Layout
goal: Prove you can create and style a clean responsive page section.
what_to_build: A browser page with three cards that stack on mobile and sit side-by-side on wider screens.
steps: Add three cards with headings and short text
Add a media query for small screens
Write README.md with what you practiced
proof_required: Include screenshot or README note explaining the mobile layout
why_this_exists: This replaces an older quest that looked too generic. KDT OS regenerated it using the skill (HTML/CSS), source (Project Analysis: KDT OS), and your need for exact, verifiable steps.

teach_me_breakdown.label: What is this skill?
teach_me_breakdown.answer: HTML/CSS is a skill KDT OS can practice through small exact quests.

teach_me_breakdown.label: Why practice it?
teach_me_breakdown.answer: Practicing it in a tiny project makes it easier to use later in a larger project.

quest_standard.rule: Every KDT OS quest must include exact steps, proof, success criteria, and a return path.
